issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios and edge cases comprehensively.

scenarios.name: Wire up a Tiptap React editor with Yjs collaborative editing and shared cursors
scenarios.rationale: Baseline installed Collaboration extension but missed StarterKit.configure({ history: false }) and CollaborationCursor user prop; treatment matched the skill's component verbatim including provider+doc cleanup in useEffect and WebsocketProvider construction in useMemo.

scenarios.name: Add offline-first persistence so edits survive disconnect and merge on reconnect
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentioned IndexedDB generally but did not know y-indexeddb's IndexeddbPersistence API or that both providers attach to the same Y.Doc; treatment used new IndexeddbPersistence(name, doc) plus WebsocketProvider on the same doc and the 'synced' event exactly as Step 'Offline Support and Sync' shows.
